message:
refactor(file_refs): simplify escaped-character handling in parse_quoted_file_ref

Consolidate the escaped-character branch: instead of duplicating the
push(ch) call in both the recognized-escape and unrecognized-escape
arms, push the backslash only for unrecognized escapes and always push
the character itself. This reduces the branch from 5 lines to 3 with
identical semantics.

Also replace one `"".to_string()` with `String::new()` in the test
assertion to satisfy the clippy manual_string_new lint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
